ns1:revision.ns1:comment: initial page creation as part of accelerated wiki migration
ns1:revision.ns1:text:
{| class='wikitable' |- !Note: This page originated on the old Lustre wiki. It was identified as likely having value and was migrated to the new wiki. It is in the process of being reviewed/updated and may currently have content that is out of date. |}
<small>''(Updated: Jan 2010)''</small>
For information about managing OSTs, see: * [[Creating and Managing OST Pools]]. Provides a means for allocating file striping to a subset of OSTs in a Lustre™ cluster.
* [[Managing Free Space]]. Describes two stripe allocation methods used to optimize file system performance: round-robin and weighted.
* [[Handling Full OSTs]]. Provides procedures for checking file system usage, taking a full OST offline, and migrating data within a file system.
For additional information about file striping, see:
* [[Configuring Lustre File Striping]]. Describes now to configure striping and how to display striping information for a file. * [http://wiki.lustre.org/manual/LustreManual20_HTML/ManagingStripingFreeSpace.html#50438209_pgfId-5529 Chapter 18: ''Managing File Striping and Free Space''] in the [http://wiki.lustre.org/manual/LustreManual20_HTML/index.html ''Lustre Operations Manual'']
See also [[Lustre System Configuration Utilities]].
[[Category: NeedsReview]]
